series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains Aircraft Fuel Records and A/C Fuel Receipts, FBO Fuel Report, Parts, Labor Hours, External Services, Farm Gas and Fixed Base Operator Fuel records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper documents until scanned electronically then destroy paper. ; Electronic: Retain in electronic database for four (4) years plus current year, then destroy. If the record series is currently being audited by the Auditor of State, destroy once the audit report is released., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
